attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
COALESCE( NRLGD.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,-999),
SM.AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE_KEY AS AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE_KEY     ,
(CFI.AMOUNT*GL.PL_CONVERSION_RATE) AS TWO_TIER_INVOICE_USD_AMT      ,
CFI.AMOUNT AS TWO_TIER_INVOICE_TRXL_AMT     ,
AR.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT           ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT          ,
'=' AS DD_TWO_TIER_THEATER_NAME      ,
COALESCE(CAT.ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CD       ,
COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS DD_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD     ,
CFI.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT         ,
CFI.SS_CODE AS SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM (SELECT CASE
		WHEN TRX.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
		WHEN TRX.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC'
		END AS SS_CODE, TRX.*
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_2TIER_TRX_ALL TRX) CFI
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NRLGD
ON (NRLGD.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT=CFI.TRANSACTION_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE SM
ON CFI.TRANSACTION_ID=SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND CFI.SS_CODE=SM.SS_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
ON NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_NUM
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_YEAR
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
ON CAT.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT=CFI.CUSTOMER_ID
AND CAT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR
ON AR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT=CFI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
AND AR.SS_CODE=CFI.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
ON CFI.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'CISCO'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV LOC
ON LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY=AR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
ON CFI.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS BK
ON OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=BK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE GL
ON GL.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=BK.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
AND GL.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
AND GL.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE

UNION ALL

SELECT
 COALESCE( NRLGD.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,-999),
SM.AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE_KEY AS AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE_KEY     ,
(CFI.AMOUNT*GL.PL_CONVERSION_RATE) AS TWO_TIER_INVOICE_USD_AMT      ,
CFI.AMOUNT AS TWO_TIER_INVOICE_TRXL_AMT     ,
AR.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT           ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT          ,
'=' AS DD_TWO_TIER_THEATER_NAME      ,
COALESCE(CAT.ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CD       ,
COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS DD_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD     ,
CFI.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT         ,
CFI.SS_CODE AS SS_CD                         ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM (SELECT CASE
		WHEN TRX.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
		WHEN TRX.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC'
		END AS SS_CODE, TRX.*
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CFI_2TIER_TRX_ALL TRX) CFI
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NRLGD
  ON (NRLGD.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT=CFI.TRANSACTION_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE SM
ON CFI.TRANSACTION_ID=SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND CFI.SS_CODE=SM.SS_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
ON NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_NUM
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_YEAR
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
ON CAT.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT=CFI.CUSTOMER_ID
AND CAT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR
ON AR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT=CFI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
AND AR.SS_CODE=CFI.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
ON CFI.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'CISCO'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV LOC
ON LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY=AR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
ON CFI.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS BK
ON OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=BK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE GL
ON GL.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=BK.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
AND GL.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
AND GL.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE

SELECT 
CFI.AMOUNT, CFI.CREATED_BY, CFI.CREATION_DATE, CFI.CUSTOMER_ID, CFI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, CFI.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CFI.GLOBAL_NAME, CFI.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CFI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CFI.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CFI.LATEST_FLAG, CFI.ORG_ID, CFI.PERIOD_NUM, CFI.PERIOD_YEAR, CFI.QUANTITY_INVOICED, CFI.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, CFI.TRANSACTION_ID, CFI.TRX_NUMBER, CFI.TRX_TYPE, CFI.BATCH_ID, CFI.CREATE_DATETIME, CFI.ACTION_CD, 
'RI'
FROM (SELECT CASE
		WHEN TRX.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
		WHEN TRX.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC'
		END AS SS_CODE, TRX.*
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_2TIER_TRX_ALL TRX) CFI
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE SM
WHERE CFI.TRANSACTION_ID=SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND CFI.SS_CODE=SM.SS_CD)

OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
WHERE CAT.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT=CFI.CUSTOMER_ID
AND CAT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')

OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV LOC
ON LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY=AR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND AR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT=CFI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
AND AR.SS_CODE=CFI.SS_CODE
)

OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
WHERE CFI.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'CISCO')

OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS BK
ON OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=BK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE GL
ON GL.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=BK.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
AND GL.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
AND GL.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=(SELECT NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
WHERE NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_NUM
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_YEAR
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year')
AND CFI.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
)

SELECT
 COALESCE(NRLGD.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,-999),
 SM.AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE_KEY AS AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE_KEY     ,
 ( (coalesce(CFI.ACCOUNTED_CR,0) - coalesce(CFI.ACCOUNTED_DR,0) ) * GL.PL_CONVERSION_RATE) as TWO_TIER_INVOICE_USD_AMT ,
 ( coalesce(CFI.ENTERED_CR,0) - coalesce(CFI.ENTERED_DR,0) ) AS TWO_TIER_INVOICE_TRXL_AMT,
 AR.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT           ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT          ,
 '=' AS DD_TWO_TIER_THEATER_NAME      ,
 COALESCE(CAT.ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CD       ,
 COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS DD_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD     ,
 CAST(CFI.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID as INTEGER) AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT         ,
 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 'I' as ACTION_CODE,
 '=' as DML_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_XLA_AE_LINE_2TIER_INCR CFI
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NRLGD
  ON (NRLGD.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT=CFI.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID)
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON ( NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = CFI.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE SM
 ON CAST(CFI.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID as INTEGER)=SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SM.SS_CD
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
 ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = CFI.AE_HEADER_ID
 AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = CFI.APPLICATION_ID
 AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = CFI.GLOBAL_NAME
 AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
 /*ON NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_NUM
 AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_YEAR*/
 ON  CAST(EXAHA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
 AND CAST(EXAHA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE)<= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
 AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
 /*INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY_TV NEPTV
   ON CAST(CAST(CFI.PARTY_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))= NEPTV.SK_ERP_CUSTOMER_ID
   AND NEPTV.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
 ON CAT.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER = NEPTV.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER
 AND CAT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 */
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV NECALUT
 ON CAST(CAST(CFI.PARTY_SITE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)) = NECALUT.SK_SITE_USE_ID
 AND NECALUT.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE = 'BILL_TO'
 AND NECALUT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
 ON NECALUT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = CAT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
 AND CAT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 /*nnainala : Added EL join to get CUSTOMER_TRX_ID */
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EL_TRX_LNS
 ON EL_TRX_LNS.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID= CAST(CFI.TRX_LINE_ID as INTEGER)
 AND EL_TRX_LNS.GLOBAL_NAME = CFI.GLOBAL_NAME        
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR
 ON AR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT=EL_TRX_LNS.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND AR.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 /* nnainala : Added N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV join to get ORG info */
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT
 ON cast(CFI.ORDER_NUMBER as INTEGER) = NSOVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
 AND NSOVT.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 AND NSOVT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
 /*ON CFI.ORG_ID=COU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT*/
 ON NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT = COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE
 AND COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
 AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'CISCO'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV LOC
 ON LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY=AR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
 /*ON CFI.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT*/
 ON CFI.LEDGER_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS BK
 ON OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=BK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE GL
 ON GL.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=BK.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
 AND GL.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
 AND GL.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
 AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NOT NULL
 AND COALESCE(EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
 COALESCE(NRLGD.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,-999),
 SM.AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE_KEY AS AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE_KEY     ,
 ( (coalesce(CFI.ACCOUNTED_CR,0) - coalesce(CFI.ACCOUNTED_DR,0) ) * GL.PL_CONVERSION_RATE) as TWO_TIER_INVOICE_USD_AMT ,
 ( coalesce(CFI.ENTERED_CR,0) - coalesce(CFI.ENTERED_DR,0) ) AS TWO_TIER_INVOICE_TRXL_AMT,
 AR.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT           ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT          ,
 '=' AS DD_TWO_TIER_THEATER_NAME      ,
 COALESCE(CAT.ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_ERP_SALES_CHANNEL_CD       ,
 COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS DD_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD     ,
 CAST(CFI.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID as INTEGER) AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT         ,
 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 'I' as ACTION_CODE,
 '=' as DML_TYPE
 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_CFI_2TIER_TRX_ALL CFI
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NRLGD
  ON (NRLGD.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT=CFI.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID)
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON ( NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = CFI.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE SM
 ON CAST(CFI.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID as INTEGER)=SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SM.SS_CD
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
 ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = CFI.AE_HEADER_ID
 AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = CFI.APPLICATION_ID
 AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = CFI.GLOBAL_NAME
 AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
 /*ON NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_NUM
 AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=CFI.PERIOD_YEAR*/
 ON  CAST(EXAHA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
 AND CAST(EXAHA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE)<= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
 AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE='Fiscal Year'
 /*INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY_TV NEPTV
   ON CAST(CAST(CFI.PARTY_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))= NEPTV.SK_ERP_CUSTOMER_ID
   AND NEPTV.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
 ON CAT.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER = NEPTV.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER
 AND CAT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 */
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV NECALUT
 ON CAST(CAST(CFI.PARTY_SITE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)) = NECALUT.SK_SITE_USE_ID
 AND NECALUT.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE = 'BILL_TO'
 AND NECALUT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
 ON NECALUT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = CAT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
 AND CAT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
 /*nnainala : Added EL join to get CUSTOMER_TRX_ID */
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EL_TRX_LNS
 ON EL_TRX_LNS.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID= CAST(CFI.TRX_LINE_ID as INTEGER)
 AND EL_TRX_LNS.GLOBAL_NAME = CFI.GLOBAL_NAME        
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR
 ON AR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT=EL_TRX_LNS.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND AR.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 /* nnainala : Added N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV join to get ORG info */
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT
 ON cast(CFI.ORDER_NUMBER as INTEGER) = NSOVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
 AND NSOVT.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 AND NSOVT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT COU
 ON NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT = COU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE
 AND COU.OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE='3500-01-01'
 AND COU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'CISCO'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV LOC
 ON LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY=AR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY OP
 /*ON CFI.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT*/
 ON CFI.LEDGER_ID=OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS BK
 ON OP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=BK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE GL
 ON GL.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=BK.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
 AND GL.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
 AND GL.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
 AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NOT NULL
 AND COALESCE(EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'                 
/*^^^^^^^^^^^^^*/

SELECT
   XAL.AE_HEADER_ID,
   XAL.AE_LINE_NUM,
   XAL.APPLICATION_ID,
   XAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
   NULL AS GL_SL_LINK_ID, /*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
   XAL.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
   XAL.PARTY_ID,
   XAL.PARTY_SITE_ID,
   XAL.PARTY_TYPE_CODE,
   XAL.ENTERED_DR,
   XAL.ENTERED_CR,
   COALESCE(XAL.ACCOUNTED_DR,0)ACCOUNTED_DR,
   COALESCE(XAL.ACCOUNTED_CR,0) ACCOUNTED_CR,
   XAL.CURRENCY_CODE,
   NULL AS ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, /*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
   XAL.ORDER_NUMBER,
   XAL.ORDER_LINE_ID,
   XAL.TRX_NUMBER,
   XAL.TRX_LINE_ID,
   '3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TRX_DATE,
   XAL.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID,
   XAL.DIST_TYPE,
   XAL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
  XAL.TRANSACTION_ID,
   NULL AS GL_SL_LINK_TABLE, /*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
   COALESCE(XAL.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0) AS UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,
   COALESCE(XAL.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0) AS UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,
   COALESCE(XAL.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) AS UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,
   COALESCE(XAL.ENTERED_CR,0) AS UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,
   XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE,
   XAL.LEDGER_ID,
   NULL AS SOURCE_TABLE,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
   NULL AS SOURCE_ID, /*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
   XAL.CREATION_DATE,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
   XAL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
 'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME, /*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
   XAL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
   XAL.EDW_CREATE_USER,
   XAL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
   XAL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
   'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_XLA_AE_LINE_2TIER_INCR XAL
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (XAL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 ( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_AR_TRX_2TIER_INVOICE WAT2I
   WHERE WAT2I.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = cast(XAL.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID as INTEGER)
    AND WAT2I.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
